page.content: In the analysis of iron ratios, the table presents five conditions with their respective median saliva/serum iron ratio, median saliva/serum ferritin ratio, and median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio, where the Control group has a median saliva/serum iron ratio of 1.2, a median saliva/serum ferritin ratio of 1.4, and a median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio of 1.1; Thalassemia Major shows a median saliva/serum iron ratio of 1.3, a median saliva/serum ferritin ratio of 0.8, and a median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio of 1.1; Thalassemia Intermedia presents a median saliva/serum iron ratio of 1.1, a median saliva/serum ferritin ratio of 0.8, and a median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio of 1.2; Thalassemia Trait also shows a median saliva/serum iron ratio of 1.1, a median saliva/serum ferritin ratio of 0.8, and a median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio of 1.1; and Iron Deficiency Anemia has a median saliva/serum iron ratio of 1.8, a median saliva/serum ferritin ratio of 2.7, and a median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio of 2.1.

ferritin ratio of 2.7, and a median saliva/serum iron binding capacity ratio of 2.1.

page.content: Furthermore, the thermal dissipation method table details the cooling fan method with a saturated temperature of the μ-processor at 50°C, while distilled water shows 35°C, CNT based liquid (0.2 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) at 34°C, CNT based liquid (0.4 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) at 32°C, CNT based liquid (0.6 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) at 31°C, CNT based liquid (0.8 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) at 29°C, and CNT based liquid (1.0 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) and (1.2 g MWCNTs-COOH/litre) both at 28°C.
